accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text; identification of Secretary of Commerce is accurate real-world context since NOAA/Commerce administers Magnuson-Stevens.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as setting deadlines for fishery disaster spend plan review and funding.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes changes to the Magnuson-Stevens Act provisions.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the 'if applicable' conditional for spend plan content requirements.

effective_dates.why: No explicit effective date stated in the bill beyond approval; omission is appropriate.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all key provisions including the 120-day, 10-day, 90-day timelines and OMB concurrent review.

correct_entities.why: Magnuson-Stevens Act, OMB Director correctly identified.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
